attempts.reflection: You failed to craft the smoker because you did not acquire enough cobblestone before attempting to craft the furnace. Specifically, you needed 8 cobblestone to craft the furnace, but you only mined 6 cobblestone. To fix this, ensure you gather the required 8 cobblestone before attempting to craft the furnace. Additionally, avoid repetitive actions like mining cobblestone multiple times when you already have enough. Correctly order your steps to first gather sufficient cobblestone, then craft the furnace, and finally the smoker.

attempts.reflection: You need to first obtain a crafting table before attempting to make any tools or further items. Start by crafting a crafting table using 4 oak planks. Then, use the crafting table to make a wooden pickaxe, followed by sticks and cobblestone. Finally, you can attempt to craft the smoker. Ensure you have the necessary materials before crafting each item.
